zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton是John de Bytton和Ida De Odingsells的兒子，於1290年出生在英國英格蘭布里斯托韓納姆。他於1313年與Hawise Furneaux在英國薩默塞特阿生頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1330年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton是John de Bytton和Ida De Odingsells的儿子，于1290年出生在英国英格兰布里斯托韓納姆。他于1313年与Hawise Furneaux在英国薩默塞特阿生頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1330年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bytton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Yoram, Aharon, Haim, Ilan, Itsik, Menashe, Moshe, Ronen, Tali, Yosef.  French Michel, Yvan, Alain, Armand, Herve, Jacques, Josephe.
Jewish (Sephardic): from the medieval male personal name Viton, from the Romance root vita ‘life’.

English: topographic name perhaps from Middle English bittem, a phonological variant of botme ‘bottom’; compare Bottom . Alternatively, a habitational name from a place in Gloucestershire named Bitton. The place takes its name from the Boyd river, a Celtic river name of uncertain origin + Old English tūn ‘settlement, farmstead’.

variants.name: Bottom
meanings: English (northern): topographic name for someone who lived in a dell, hollow, or valley floor, from Middle English bot(h)me, Old English botm ‘valley bottom’. Compare Botham .
Americanized form (mistranslation into English) of French Lafond , in which Old French la fond ‘the fountain’ is confused with modern French le fond ‘the bottom’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton was born in 1290, in Hanham, Bristol, England, United Kingdom as the son of John de Bytton and Ida De Odingsells. He married Hawise Furneaux in 1313, in Ashington, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1330, in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton est né en 1290, à Hanham, Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John de Bytton et Ida De Odingsells. Il a épousé Hawise Furneaux en 1313, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1330, à Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton wurde 1290 in Hanham, Bristol, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John de Bytton und Ida De Odingsells geboren. Er hat 1313 in Ashington, Somerset, England Hawise Furneaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1330 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton è nato il nel 1290 nel Hanham, Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John de Bytton e Ida De Odingsells. Lui sposato Hawise Furneaux nel 1313, nel Ashington, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1330, nel Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Byttonは1290年にイギリスイギリスブリストルハンハムでJohn de ByttonとIda De Odingsellsの息子として生まれた。1313年にイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンでHawise Furneauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1330年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストクで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton(은)는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨 핸함에서 John de Bytton(와)과 Ida De Odingsells의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1313년 영국 서머세트 애신그턴에서 Hawise Furneaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 맥스스토크에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton nasceu em 1290, em Hanham, Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John de Bytton e Ida De Odingsells. Ele casou-se com Hawise Furneaux em 1313, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1330, em Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton родился в 1290 г. в местности ханам, бристол, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John de Bytton и Ida De Odingsells. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Furneaux в 1313 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1330 г. в местности макссток, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Bytton nació en 1290, en Hanham, Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John de Bytton y Ida De Odingsells. Se casó con Hawise Furneaux en 1313, en Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1330, en Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
